title: Flooring & Interior
description: High-quality timber products designed for beautiful interior spaces including floors and feature walls.

title: Outdoor & Landscaping
description: Durable timber solutions perfect for decks, gardens, sleepers, and exterior features.

title: Structural & Cladding
description: Robust timber beams, boards, and cladding engineered for architectural and structural integrity.

title: Slabs & Custom Timber
description: Unique, natural-edge timber slabs including Swamp Kauri and Eucalyptus tailored for bespoke furniture and statement pieces.
